name: link_facebook
description: Generate Facebook feed links for product URLs, including mobile and device-specific URLs when applicable.
description_pl: Generuje linki feedu Facebooka do adresów produktów, w tym adresy mobilne i specyficzne dla urządzeń gdy dotyczy.
notes: Produces Facebook product URLs for g:link and device-specific URLs from card/@url or ../../card/@url, appending size selection for multiple sizes.
